creative_brief: Warm, nostalgic split-frame: left side shows a faded photo of a farmer handing produce over a gate; right side shows a modern FarmThru hub with real farm names on crates. Earthy palette.
primary_text:
When did you last know the name of the farmer who raised your beef?

Most of us stopped asking. The supermarket made it easy not to.

FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store. Every product traces to a named NSW farm. No middlemen between them and your family.

Collect from the Brookvale hub, Monday to Friday. No commitment.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: When did we stop knowing our farmers?
description: Farm-direct from named NSW farms. Zero middlemen. Collect from Brookvale, no commitment.
